sourceMovie.title: Through My Window
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Through My Window (2022) as a romance theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Through My Window clicked for you, Love, Rosie (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Through My Window?
faq.answer: Try Love, Rosie, Emma, Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy—each shares DNA with Through My Window while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Through My Window?
faq.answer: Through My Window (2022) is best described as Romance, Drama, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Through My Window part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Through My Window Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
